title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Decathlon India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Decathlon India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!
